column4: 100-hour inspection. Compression check: cyl 1: 78/80, cyl 2: 76/80, cyl 3: 78/80, cyl 4: 77/80. Spark plugs cleaned and gapped. Oil filter cut and inspected — no metal. Returned to service.

Left magneto replacement per AD 2019-20-10. Removed Slick 4376 magneto and installed overhauled unit P/N 4376-OH. Timing set to 25° BTDC. Run-up: mag drop within limits (R: 75 RPM, L: 60 RPM). Return to service.
column7: Engine won't start – fuel issue suspected

column4: Oil and filter change. Drained 8 qt Aeroshell W100 Plus. Replaced filter (Champion CH48108-1). Filter cut — clean, no metal. Refilled with 8 qt Aeroshell W100 Plus. Run-up normal.
